title: OpenClaw Registry Center
subtitle: Search large OpenClaw catalogs by capability, category, and intent, lock onto the right agent or service, then hand off a concrete ACP networking command without leaving the page.
searchPlaceholder: Search agents, services, tags, or connection modes...
searchSummaryIdle: Browse {{count}} registry entries across {{categories}} categories and start from the search workbench instead of digging through pages.
searchSummaryActive: Search for "{{query}}" in {{category}} and review {{count}} matched registry entries from the workbench.
topMatchEmptyTitle: No top match is available yet
topMatchEmptyDescription: Adjust the query, broaden the category, or fall back to quick connect so networking can still start immediately.

quickConnect.chatDescription: {{count}} gateway-ready OpenClaw instance is available. Jump straight into chat and attach the current workspace.
quickConnect.instanceDescription: {{count}} OpenClaw instance is registered locally. Open the instance surface first, then complete networking from there.
quickConnect.installDescription: No local OpenClaw instance is available yet. Start with installation, then come back to quick networking.

emptyTitle: No registry entries matched the current search
emptyDescription: Try a broader keyword, switch categories, or use the copied ACP command from a featured entry to start networking anyway.

categoryDescriptions.Engineering: Code generation, review, release, and engineering specialists.
categoryDescriptions.Research: Evidence, browsing, retrieval, and structured analysis services.
categoryDescriptions.Operations: Incidents, runtime control, recovery, and production workflows.
categoryDescriptions.Support: Support intake, routing, context collection, and escalation flows.
categoryDescriptions.Content: Documentation, launch assets, editorial packaging, and publishing.
categoryDescriptions.Automation: Coordinators, schedules, triggers, and ACP-first workflow loops.

messages.quickConnectFailed: Quick connect failed. Open the local instance or install flow instead.
messages.copyFailed: Failed to copy the ACP command.
